title: coeloglossum
intro: Coeloglossum, also known as the frog orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family and is native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The medicinal properties of Coeloglossum lie in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating, making it a natural remedy for gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Coeloglossum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic, providing relief from muscle cramps and spasms. Coeloglossum can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried roots and leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
